metadata.title: Thiago Mota's Portfolio
metadata.description: This is my portfolio website. Check out my projects and skills.

home.description: I have {years} years of experience in software development, with a focus on frontend.

senior-software-developer.title: Senior Software Developer
senior-software-developer.description:
• Developed a ReactJS framework utilized across multiple projects at Philips, focusing on performance and responsiveness
  • Maintained and enhanced an existing Electron.js editor that integrates with the framework, adding new features and improvements
  • Created components for the new Philips EMR design system
  • Conducted regular code reviews to ensure high code quality standards and best practices
  • Implemented comprehensive e2e and unit tests using Playwright and Vitest/Jest
  • Provided technical support and guidance to multiple teams utilizing the framework

frontend-developer.title: Frontend Developer
frontend-developer.description:
• Developed multiple intranets and applications in SharePoint using ReactJS and AngularJS
  • Built a comprehensive component library utilized across multiple company projects
  • Improved performance and scalability of existing components, achieving 30% faster load times
  • Conducted regular code reviews to maintain code quality standards
  • Mentored 3 interns on company processes, technical skills, and best practices
  • Successfully served as technical co-lead, defining architecture and development strategy for a complex multi-part form (10+ tabs, 60+ fields) within a 3-developer team

frontend-intern.title: Frontend Intern
frontend-intern.description:
• Developed multiple intranets and applications in SharePoint using ReactJS and AngularJS
  • Contributed to the development of a reusable component library for company-wide projects

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Here are some of the projects I've worked on, showcasing my skills and experience.

ultimateTicTacToe.name: Ultimate Tic Tac Toe
ultimateTicTacToe.description: A reproduction of the classic ultimate tic tac toe game featuring real-time multiplayer functionality with WebSockets, internationalization support, and light/dark theme switching for an enhanced user experience.

bytebank.name: Bytebank
bytebank.description: A financial management application developed as a postgraduate team challenge. Features include user authentication, S3 storage for transaction attachments, graphs for financial analysis, micro front-end architecture, custom design system documented in Storybook, responsive web design, and a planned native mobile app.

portfolio.name: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.description: A modern, responsive portfolio website showcasing my projects and skills. Features internationalization and an innovative IDE-inspired design that reflects my passion for clean, intuitive user interfaces.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's get in touch! Feel free to reach out for any inquiries or collaboration opportunities.

footer.message: Feel free to reach out for collaborations, job opportunities, or just to say hello!
